items.name_en: 💕Imported original leather💕Complete original packaging💕This brand classic GG Marmont series handbag is crafted from extremely soft nappa leather, adorned with double G hardware and paired with a three-dimensional, multi-faceted chain shoulder strap, making the entire bag structure soft and exquisite.
items.name_cn:
💕Imported original leather💕Complete original packaging💕This brand classic GG Marmont series handbag is crafted from extremely soft nappa leather, adorned with double G hardware and paired with a three-dimensional, multi-faceted chain shoulder strap, making the entire bag structure soft and exquisite.
Apricot pink quilted V-shaped nappa leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Taupe viscose lining
Double G
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Exterior: One slip pocket
Sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (56cm high)
Spring buckle flap
Model: 837267
Dimensions: 26cm (W) x 15cm (H) x 7cm (D)
Weight: Approx. 0.65kg
Color: Apricot pink/Original leather
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💕Includes full original green box packaging💕GG👉The Gucci Cosmogonie collection debuted at the historic Montecastle in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Canvas, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap, double-G magnetic snap closure.

Adjustable shoulder strap, double-G magnetic snap closure.
Model: 726274.
Dimensions: 39(W)x 38(H)x 2(D)
Color: Black/Original leather.
